description_long: This is a small, sleek airplane with a predominantly green fuselage accented by yellow, red, and brown camouflage-like patterns. The wings are swept back and feature pointed tips with pinkish cylindrical elements, possibly representing missile pods or fuel tanks. Two prominent red engine nacelles are mounted above the wings, and the cockpit is enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy situated at the front of the fuselage. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer with a slight dihedral angle. The overall design suggests a modern, agile aircraft, possibly inspired by military jet trainers or light attack planes.
description: A compact, green airplane with swept wings, red engine nacelles, and a blue-tinted cockpit canopy, featuring colorful camouflage patterns.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, red engine nacelles, and the colorful camouflage pattern on the fuselage and wings.
description_view_1: Side-top view highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the swept-back wings with pink-tipped elements.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the twin red engine nacelles, narrow fuselage, and the symmetry of the swept wings.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the length of the fuselage, the single vertical stabilizer, and the placement of the engine nacelles above the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and pointed tips, featuring slight dihedral and small wingtip pods.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted above the wings in red nacelles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers with slight dihedral.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear, likely retractable, with visible main and nose gear bays.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single blue-tinted canopy, likely single-seat.
